mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
group by date(create_time)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
group by date(create_time)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
group by date(create_time)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
group by date(create_time)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_learning_records WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
group by date(create_time)

select us.username, sum(ulr.duration) as duration from users us join sys_user_role sur on us.id = sur.user_id join user_learning_records ulr on us.id = ulr.user_id where ulr.create_time >= #{startDate} and ulr.create_time <= #{endDate} and sur.role_id = 3 group by us.username order by duration desc limit #{topN}

select us.username, count(ual.user_id) as count from users us join user_action_logs ual on us.id = ual.user_id where ual.create_time >= #{startDate} and ual.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.username order by count desc limit #{topN}

select us.username, count(al.user_id) as count from users us join answers al on us.id = al.user_id where al.create_time >= #{startDate} and al.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.username order by count desc limit #{topN}

select c.title, count(ucs.user_id) as count from users us join user_courses ucs on us.id = ucs.user_id join courses c on ucs.course_id = c.id where ucs.join_time >= #{startDate} and ucs.join_time <= #{endDate} group by c.title order by count desc limit #{topN}

select us.username, count(d.id) as count from users us join questions d on us.id = d.user_id where d.create_time >= #{startDate} and d.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.username order by count desc limit #{topN}

select us.username, count(uc.user_id) as count from users us join courses c on us.id = c.teacher_id join user_courses uc on c.id = uc.course_id where c.create_time >= #{startDate} and c.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.username order by count desc limit #{topN}
